query.name: wws.tsg.clever_sections.sections.term_dates
query.description: exports sections details, course name and term dates joined by the section.termid and courses.course_number
query.sql: SELECT DISTINCT to_char(terms.firstday,'MM/DD/YYYY')AS "Term_start", to_char(terms.lastday,'MM/DD/YYYY') AS "Term_end", courses.course_name AS "Course_name", sections.course_number AS "Course_number", sections.expression AS "Period", sections.id AS "Section_id", sections.section_number AS "Section_number", sections.termid AS "Term_name", sections.teacher AS "Teacher_id", sections.schoolid AS "School_id" FROM sections JOIN terms ON terms.id = sections.termid AND terms.schoolid = sections.schoolid JOIN courses ON courses.course_number = sections.course_number WHERE terms.id >= 3500 ORDER BY sections.id
